title: USCIS requires federal contractors with a FAR requirement to provide their DUNS system during E-verify enrollment
description_html: Federal contractors and subcontractors with a Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) requirement must now provide their Data Universal Numbering System (DUNS) as they enroll in E-Verify. Existing contractors do not have to provide their DUNS but will be prompted to enter it when they update their profile. [ID #494]
description_text: Federal contractors and subcontractors with a Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) requirement must now provide their Data Universal Numbering System (DUNS) as they enroll in E-Verify.
